ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Request To Set Case For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY, a corportation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AQUINO MARLON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Benita Selor and Bernice Doner sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $25,397.80
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,245.44
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $457.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,100.24
Judgment signed in open court.
